name: Falafel (Diabetic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a food processor or blender, grind garbanzo beans, lemon juice, and onion until smooth.
3. Remove the mixture and add flour, wheat germ, parsley, sesame seeds, pepper, and garlic powder. Blend again until well combined.
4. Form the mixture into 20 falafel balls.
5. Heat oil in a large baking dish.
6. Add falafel to the hot oil and bake for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
1 serving of 5 falafels = 434 calories; 3 meat, 2 bread, 1 fat Pro 20gm, fat 9gm, carbohydrates 56gm from "Vegetarian Cooking for Diabetics"
